goal: Refactor CodyMaster LandingPage to share header/footer via JS injection; add full SEO suite; add exit-intent growth hacking bottom sheet
decisions: Use JS fetch injection (Option A) — no build tool required, works with Cloudflare Pages static deploy
Active nav state driven by data-page attribute on <body> per page
CSS tokens lifted to base.css :root so ALL pages share same design tokens
Footer CSS extracted to shared.css (eliminates ~200 lines of duplication)
SEO: full OG + Twitter + JSON-LD + canonical + robots on every page
Growth hacking: exit-intent bottom sheet (mouseleave top OR 45s timer), sessionStorage dismiss
